__NOTE__: DUMMY DATA (TH-5629/TH-5690) — hand-built trace/<id>/ (getTrace) response for the Evals-tab drawer redesign. Mirrors the real response shape; adds the fields the backend has NOT shipped yet. eval_results is keyed by eval_template_id (req 3.1: group same template in task). Delete when backend lands. See __DUMMY_KEYS__.

__DUMMY_KEYS__.result.eval_results: ENTIRE BLOCK — backend-computed rollup, keyed by eval_template_id ({trace_level, span_level}). Multiple configs of the same template (e.g. pii_task + pii_strict, both PII Detection) merge into ONE entry. Does NOT exist in the real response today.
__DUMMY_KEYS__.result.observation_spans[].eval_scores[]: template grouping key — the rollup tier; FE groups task -> template on this (dummy)
'spans' | 'traces' — splits Span vs Trace sections; matches table config row_type (dummy)
__DUMMY_KEYS__._template_key_note: eval_results is keyed by template_id ALONE. Valid here because no template spans two tasks in this fixture. If that ever happens, the key must become task_id+template_id to keep tasks' rollups separate.
__DUMMY_KEYS__._merge_case_note: PII Detection (e3000000…) merges pii_task + pii_strict (2 configs, 1 template) in the Safety task -> rollup Pass 4 Fail 1 across 5 spans; the span breakdown shows both config names.
__DUMMY_KEYS__._choice_representation_note: For output_type='choices', eval_scores[].result holds the chosen label string (dummy assumption — real choice serialization TBD with Sarthak).
__DUMMY_KEYS__._synthetic_spans_note: Only spans b2e1373eb6114b82 (root) and 14286b471bde441a (llm.gpt-4o) are real; the other 4 spans and all multi-span eval results are synthetic.
